executionHistory.summary: Greenfield analyst authoring of spec.md for a dedicated in-browser conditional-volatility forecast and vol-targeting sizing tool derived from the public 'GARCH / storm gauge' quant-sizing method. Grounded the requirement in the real research-lab catalog: the vol-targeting + fixed-vs-targeted backtest is already covered by strategy-validation-lab and strategy-self-improvement-lab, realized-vol/VaR by etf-momentum-lab, and sizing-for-survival by portfolio-survival-allocation-lab, so the differentiated primitive is narrowed to the forward conditional-volatility FORECASTER (EWMA default + optional lightweight GARCH fit) plus a regime percentile 'storm gauge' and a capped vol-targeting sizing multiplier, with the backtest delegated by deep-link to strategy-validation-lab rather than re-implemented. Authored analyst-owned sections only: Problem Statement, Outcome Contract, Goals, Non-Goals, Current Capability Map, Honest Findings, Domain Capability Model (AN5), Actors, Use Cases, Business Scenarios, Competitive Analysis, Platform Direction, Improvement Proposals, UI Scenario Matrix, Non-Functional Requirements, and a Cross-Product Applicability (QuantitativeFinance) assessment. Grounded the QF assessment in QF working-tree evidence (libs/algo-volatility garch/ewma_vol/egarch/gjr_garch, vol_model.rs realized-vol IV-percentile + typed forecast/pricing, libs/algo-portfolio kelly_criterion, gateway ai_factory vol_target sizing): QF already implements the full method in production Rust, so the tool is not a capability port for QF — its only QF-facing value is a UX/explainer reference for a future dashboard panel that consumes QF's existing models. No design.md, scopes.md, report.md, test-plan.json, scenario-manifest.json, uservalidation.md, product, or certification field was authored; those remain owned by bubbles.design, bubbles.plan, and bubbles.ux.

Authored the UX-owned UI Wireframes and User Flows sections in spec.md for the cache-first, single-file Volatility Regime and Vol-Targeting Sizing Lab (volatility-sizing-lab.html), matching the sibling FX (004) and Bond Regime (003) UX conventions. Defined 12 screen/state contracts: the Simple storm-gauge cockpit (default, curated decision view — current annualized forecast, regime band as a percentile that ALWAYS shows its trailing window + observation count, one-line conditional sizing suggestion, asset picker, freshness/provenance chips, backtest CTA); the Power model/persistence/sizing view (forecast term-structure chart decaying 1d…Nd toward long-run, persistence/half-life panel with shock/memory weight and α+β or λ, EWMA-vs-GARCH comparison as an EvidenceConflict, and a sizing card with a target-annualized-vol control + worked cash example on a user notional using min(cap, targetVol/max(floor, forecastVol))); the four degraded states (INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY, MANAGED_SUPPRESSED, FIT_NONCONVERGENT→EWMA fallback, STALE_BEYOND_POLICY), each showing its exact reason with no false calm/full-size default; loading-with-cache; the strategy-validation-lab backtest hand-off (deep-link only, no in-tool verdict); the source/provenance inspector; the Market Brief volatility owner item; and Mobile Simple + Mobile Power projections. Authored reusable UI primitives with stable pixel dimensions, an accessibility/context ruleset (every canvas has an aria-label + text/table fallback drawn synchronously in render() because rAF does not fire in hidden tabs), an evidence-and-typing semantics contract (forecast vs realized typing badges), and seven UC-mapped user flows (UC-001..UC-007) plus Simple/Power parity + mode-toggle and keyboard/mobile flows and flow invariants. Every Outcome-Contract hard constraint is honored as a UI invariant: magnitude-only (no directional element/target/top/bottom), window-visible regime percentile, capped/floored conditional sizing (apply only if a separate signal fires; never an entry or account-specific size), EWMA-default/GARCH-labeled-optimizer, and Simple/Power one-computation parity. Only the UX-owned spec.md sections and this executionHistory entry were touched; no design.md, scopes.md, report.md, test-plan.json, scenario-manifest.json, uservalidation.md, product/HTML/JS file, or top-level status/certification/completedPhaseClaims field was created or modified. Focused UX1-UX9 checks passed; canonical artifact-lint remains nonzero only for the foreign-owned missing design.md/scopes.md/report.md/uservalidation.md, so no UX completedPhaseClaim, status transition, or certification mutation was recorded. Next owner: bubbles.design for design.md.

Authored contract-grade design.md for a browser/Node-safe RLVOL capability shared by the Volatility Regime and Vol-Targeting Sizing Lab and Market Brief, matching the FX (004) contract-grade design shape. RLVOL is a new pure UMD module (rlvol.js) with no DOM/storage/network/ambient-clock code that consumes the EXISTING rldata.js bare-row daily-bar path (ensureBars/getBars, 1d default range 5y) and the EXISTING versioned putToolRead branch — rldata.js is left an unchanged read-only canary (no fork). Committed the named pure-helper surface for plan/impl/test to bind: logReturns, ewmaVar/ewmaVol (RiskMetrics λ=0.94 closed-form DEFAULT), garch11Fit (bounded capped-iteration optimizer, explicitly NOT MLE, enforces stationarity α+β<1, FIT_NONCONVERGENT→EWMA fallback), forecastTerm (flat for EWMA, geometric decay toward long-run for GARCH), annualizeVol (√252 stated), realizedVol, volPercentile (returns windowRef), regimeBand (calm/normal/elevated/storm), halfLife (ln0.5/ln persistence), sizingMultiplier (min(cap, targetVol/max(floor, forecastVol))), detectManagedSuppression, normalizeObservation, buildVolDecisionRead, buildBacktestDeepLink, projectVolToolRead, canonicalize, decisionId. Defined the typed VolObservationV1 envelope (kind forecast|realized, estimator, value/unit, horizon, annualization, params, persistence, coverageObs, windowRef, source/observedAsOf/retrievedAt/reviewWindow, availability, unavailableReason, quality, limitations), the immutable VolDecisionReadV1 feeding Simple/Power/owner-read/deep-link, and the single normalized rl-tool-read/v1 owner read (id volatility-sizing-lab) Market Brief consumes without recomputing. Specified the closed availability/unavailable state machine (INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY, NONFINITE, NO_COMMON_DATES, FIT_NONCONVERGENT, MANAGED_SUPPRESSED, SOURCE_ERROR, STALE_BEYOND_POLICY) with detection + required UI behavior each; the data-reach/fetch contract (5y default, best-effort caveated 10y/max, no multi-decade single-path claim, cache-first then delta hydrate); the cap/floor sizing contract; the synchronous-canvas rendering contract (no rAF); the strategy-validation-lab deep-link (emission-only, no in-tool backtest); the volatility-sizing-universe.json schema; the tools.json/index.html/rlnav.js/README/notes registration parity (id volatility-sizing-lab, file volatility-sizing-lab.html, nav 'Vol Sizing' 🌪️); and compatibility/security/accessibility/performance/test-surface/dirty-tree boundary sections plus a Hard-Constraint Traceability table and a Complexity Tracking section. Markdown diagnostics are clean (MD022/MD032/MD024/MD056 resolved). Authored ONLY design.md and this executionHistory entry; did not create or modify scopes.md, report.md, test-plan.json, scenario-manifest.json, uservalidation.md, any product/HTML/JS file, or the top-level status/certification/completedPhaseClaims.
